publishedAbstract: The pod `prometheus-managed-ocs-prometheus-0` constantly restarts and gets into `CrashLoopBackOff` status. Events ``` Events: Type Reason Age From Message------------------------- Warning ProbeError 15m (x1993 over 17h) kubelet Readiness probe error: Get "http://10.1.1.1:8081/readyz/": context deadline exceeded (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers) body: Warning ProbeError 33s (x1771 over 16h) kubelet Readiness probe error: Get "http://10.1.1.1:8081/readyz": context deadline exceeded (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers) ```
publishedTitle: Pod "prometheus-managed-ocs-prometheus-0" often in "CrashLoopBackOff " on ODF in OCP 4
